calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-17-2003 Vacated

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2003 Advanced From Apr-16-03 To Apr-02-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-17-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Plaintiff, Shee Yip Trustee for The Yip Family Trust present with counsel, Michael Rossoff. Defendant, Alex Longardino present with counsel, Yoself Peretz. Parties settled pursuant to stipulation on record. Terms as follow: Defendant to vacate by 9AM. on May 1, 2003 and pay sum of $1,401.58 for April rent. Plaintiff agreed to give defendant the total sum of $4,000.00 at 9AM. on May 1,2003. If defendant fail to vacate and pay rent, plaintiff may apply with the court for possession and money judgment with a 48 hours ex parte application. Each side to bear own costs and attorney's fees. Defendant agreed to dismissed without prejudice the wrongful eviction action # 419119 and retain the right to pettition the rent board of rules and regulations 1010. Plaintiff agreed to have defendant store any personal properties on premisses under tarp and out of way for other workers. Case settled and trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-02-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Susan Longardino appearing in propria persona 387-9016, also for defendant Alex Longardino, demurring party
Michael S. Rossoff, Esq., 863-7100, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT ALEX and Susan LONGARDINO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Overruled, 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
